languages.text: {n}Вы узнаете голос эльдара, с судном которого некогда схлестнулись в соседней системе. Видскрины авгуров подсвечивают не залатанные пробоины — напоминание о вашей победе.{/n}
{n}You recognise the voice of the Aeldari whose vessel you once engaged in a neighbouring system. The augur vid-screens highlight unpatched hull breaches — a testament to your victory.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы узнаете голос эльдара, с судном которого некогда схлестнулись в соседней системе. Видскрины авгуров подсвечивают не залатанные пробоины — напоминание о вашей победе.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du erkennst die Stimme des Aeldari, dessen Schiff du einst in einem benachbarten System attackiert hast. Die Vid-Bildschirme der Auguren zeigen Schäden am Rumpf an — ein Zeugnis deines Sieges.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You recognise the voice of the Aeldari whose vessel you once engaged in a neighbouring system. The augur vid-screens highlight unpatched hull breaches — a testament to your victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du erkennst die Stimme des Aeldari, dessen Schiff du einst in einem benachbarten System attackiert hast. Die Vid-Bildschirme der Auguren zeigen Schäden am Rumpf an — ein Zeugnis deines Sieges.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous reconnaissez la voix de l'Aeldari que vous avez affronté dans un système voisin. Les écrans vidéo des augures montrent de nombreuses brèches dans le fuselage. Votre victoire est indéniable.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You recognise the voice of the Aeldari whose vessel you once engaged in a neighbouring system. The augur vid-screens highlight unpatched hull breaches — a testament to your victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous reconnaissez la voix de l'Aeldari que vous avez affronté dans un système voisin. Les écrans vidéo des augures montrent de nombreuses brèches dans le fuselage. Votre victoire est indéniable.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你认出了这个声音，这正是曾在临近星系与你交过手的那个艾达灵族。俄歇矩阵视讯屏幕上标出了尚未修补的舰壳破口——那是你的胜利之证。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You recognise the voice of the Aeldari whose vessel you once engaged in a neighbouring system. The augur vid-screens highlight unpatched hull breaches — a testament to your victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你认出了这个声音，这正是曾在临近星系与你交过手的那个艾达灵族。俄歇矩阵视讯屏幕上标出了尚未修补的舰壳破口——那是你的胜利之证。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Reconoces la voz del Aeldari a cuya nave te enfrentaste en un sistema cercano. Las videopantallas del augur señalan brechas en el casco sin arreglar: pruebas de tu victoria.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You recognise the voice of the Aeldari whose vessel you once engaged in a neighbouring system. The augur vid-screens highlight unpatched hull breaches — a testament to your victory.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Reconoces la voz del Aeldari a cuya nave te enfrentaste en un sistema cercano. Las videopantallas del augur señalan brechas en el casco sin arreglar: pruebas de tu victoria.{/n}

languages.text: {n}かつて近隣の星系で小競り合いをしたエルダー船の声に聞き覚えがある。オーガーのビュースクリーンは、修復されていない裂け目を強調している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You recognise the voice of the Eldar whose ship you once skirmished with in a neighbouring system. The augur viewscreens highlight unrepaired breaches, a reminder of your victory.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir zamanlar komşu bir sistemde gemisiyle çatıştığın Aeldari'nin sesini tanıyorsun. Alamet video ekranları, zaferinin bir kanıtı olarak henüz onarılmamış gövde gediklerini vurguluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You recognise the voice of the Aeldari whose vessel you once engaged in a neighbouring system. The augur vid-screens highlight unpatched hull breaches — a testament to your victory.{/n}
